name: Denshway Museum
description: The Denshway Museum memorializes the 1906 Denshawai Incident. Housed in a building shaped like a traditional pigeon tower, it opened in 1999 and contains five halls of exhibits (paintings, statues, photographs, a model gallows) on the historic confrontation.

name: El-Sadat Museum
description: This museum in Sadat’s birthplace (Mit Abu al-Kom) is dedicated to President Anwar El-Sadat. It houses the late president’s personal belongings, military uniform, and historic photographs from his life and international visits.
